tech_stack.orchestration: Agno Agent OS (FastAPI Backend) — five agents registered
tech_stack.pipeline: Five atomic nodes: Node1=Ollama phi3.5 classify (keep_alive=5m), Node2=Python similarity safety net, Node3=Ollama phi3.5 rewrite (already hot), Node4=Python direct tool execution (zero LLM), Node5=General Reasoning Agent (Agno Agent, qwen3-32b via Groq)
tech_stack.intent_classifier: Ollama phi3.5 (local, http://localhost:11434) — classify only (Node 1), keep_alive=5m so Node 3 reuse same loaded model
tech_stack.similarity_safety_net: Node 2 — Python database.search_chunks(top_k=1), overrides SEARCH to RAG if similarity > 0.25
tech_stack.query_rewriter: Ollama phi3.5 (local, Node 3) — rewrite only, already hot from Node 1 keep_alive
tech_stack.synthesis_llm: qwen/qwen3-32b via Groq (Agno Agent, no direct httpx) — General Reasoning Agent (Node 5)
tech_stack.coordinator_shell: openai/gpt-oss-20b via Groq — reliable JSON tool calls, no Hermes XML
tech_stack.vector_database: DuckDB with vss extension (and pure SQL cosine fallback)
tech_stack.sub_agents: Agno Agent objects: RAG Agent (document_lookup tool), Tracker Agent (3 tools), General Reasoning Agent (no tools)

agent_inventory.name: Coordinator
agent_inventory.job: AgentOS shell — calls route_query tool, extracts synthesized answer for chat UI

agent_inventory.name: Query Rewriter
agent_inventory.job: Clean and rewrite query for target tool. Returns str for RAG/CALCULATOR/SEARCH, dict for MULTI

agent_inventory.name: RAG Agent
agent_inventory.job: Document retrieval with self-evaluation and similarity threshold (0.15). Retries once with refined keywords if poor results

agent_inventory.name: Tracker Agent
agent_inventory.job: Multi-tool orchestration for MULTI classified queries. Calls 2+ tools and combines results

agent_inventory.name: General Reasoning Agent
agent_inventory.job: Node 5 final synthesis. Receives raw tool results and produces structured 6-step answer with citations

features.description: Initialize local persistent DuckDB at ./db/embeddings.db with loaded vss extension schema.
steps: Execute schema creation for table 'document_chunks' with correct metadata columns

features.description: Setup local bge-small-en-v1.5 embedding generator and write robust pure SQL cosine fallback script.
steps: Write vector search function using vss index matching
Implement try/except catch block translating query to pure SQL math if vss driver fails

features.description: Implement structural/recursive chunker splitting on Markdown headers (#) or double newlines.
steps: Process files, extract clean paragraph context, batch generate embeddings, and upsert to DuckDB

features.description: Integrate Agno UI via AgentOS so all agents are accessible through app.agno.com.
steps: Create app.py using AgentOS (agno.playground.Playground does not exist in v2.6.18)
Fix async SSL bypass: pass AsyncOpenAI/AsyncGroq clients with httpx.AsyncClient(verify=False)
Register Coordinator, RAG Agent, Tracker Agent, General Reasoning Agent on port 7777
Add POST /query endpoint returning run_coordinator() dict as JSON
Verify all ten tests pass via /query REST endpoint

constraints: DO NOT attempt to multi-task. Complete one Feature ID at a time.
DO NOT proceed to Agno orchestration until all Phase 1 Database/Ingestion features are marked COMPLETED and verified.
DO NOT alter the core tech stack, introduce containerization, or modify the target deliverables.
Every code generation session must begin by reading this file and the git log.
